title: Coach
description: Staff-satellite adding a per-sport coaching profile. Carries tenant_id + staff_id. Cascades branch + organization + region through staff → branch. Cascades user through staff → user. NEVER carries application_id, branch_id, organization_id, region_id, or user_id directly — all cascade. One Coach per Staff at a time (partial unique index on staff_id).

staff_id.description: The underlying Staff row. RESTRICT — coach cannot be created against an offboarded staff; must archive before parent Staff can be soft-deleted. Immutable post-create.

sport_key.description: Primary sport (Wave 3+ sports registry key). e.g. basketball / swimming / general_fitness.

additional_sports.description: Array of sport_keys the coach also teaches. Empty = only primary.

coaching_level.description: Enum: assistant / head / senior / director / consultant.

certifications.description: Array of certification entries. Shape validated by valid_certifications_shape rule + schemas/coach-certification.schema.json.

rating.description: 0-5 rating from athlete/parent session ratings. Written EXCLUSIVELY by AggregateCoachRatingsJob (Wave 3+; Wave 2b remains null).

rating_count.description: Number of ratings that produced the average. Written EXCLUSIVELY by the job.

bio.description: Public-facing bio. When null, coach hidden from public directories.

head_shot_url.description: Public-facing head-shot URL. Distinct from user.profile.avatar_url (that's the user's own avatar; this is coach-specific).

availability_pattern.description: Per-day windows. Overrides staff.weekly_hours for the coaching function specifically. Shape validated by valid_availability_pattern rule.

session_capacity_per_week.description: Max sessions per week this coach will accept.

languages.description: Array of BCP-47 codes. Languages the coach coaches in.

public_email.description: Tenant-facing 'message this coach' address. Distinct from user.email.

coach_started_at.description: When this Staff assumed the coaching role. May differ from staff.started_at when a Staff promotes from receptionist to assistant coach.

coach_ended_at.description: When the coaching role ended. Set on status → archived.

indexes.name: coaches_staff_active_unique
indexes.description: One Coach per Staff at a time.

check_constraints.name: coach_tenant_matches_staff_tenant
check_constraints.description: coach.tenant_id must equal (SELECT tenant_id FROM staff WHERE id = coach.staff_id) — defense-in-depth against cross-tenant FK smuggling. Enforced at DB layer via trigger.

certificationEntry.description: One certification entry inside the certifications array.

id.description: Opaque handle for the array element. Auto-generated on add; stable across updates.

organization.description: The certifying body. e.g. 'NASM', 'ACSM', 'FA (English Football Association)', 'AASP'.

certification.description: The certification title. e.g. 'Level 2 Coaching', 'CPT', 'Youth Coaching Level 3'.

expires_at.description: Expiry date, null for indefinite. When set, must be > certified_at.

certificate_url.description: Public or private link to the certificate document.

verified_at.description: Only meaningful when coach_certifications_verified entitlement is on. Set by HR via /verify endpoint.

verified_by_user_id.description: The HR user who verified. Only set when verified_at is set.

verified_document_file_id.description: storage::File reference to the signed proof document. Only set when verified_at is set.

expired_at.description: Set by ExpireCoachCertificationsJob when expires_at is crossed. Post-expiry the entry stays in the array (auditability) but is filtered out of public renderings.

x-invariants: One Coach per Staff at a time — enforced by partial unique index on staff_id
coach.tenant_id == staff.tenant_id — enforced by trigger check constraint
sport_key must be a valid registered sport (Wave 3+; Wave 2b: soft-validate as free-text)
additional_sports must not contain the primary sport_key (dedup)
coach_started_at, when set, must be >= staff.started_at
certifications entries: expires_at > certified_at when set; certified_at <= today() + 30 days (rejects nonsense future certs)
rating is written EXCLUSIVELY by AggregateCoachRatingsJob — manual writes refused
status='archived' + rows may have coach_ended_at set; other statuses have coach_ended_at NULL
Coach cannot transition to non-archived when parent Staff.employment_status != 'active'
